title: Docparser Parsed Result
description: Parsed data result returned for a document processed by a Docparser parser. Core fields are defined; custom extracted fields vary per parser configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier of the parsed document.

file_name.description: Original filename of the uploaded document.

remote_id.description: Custom identifier assigned at upload time for tracking.

media_link.description: URL to view the document in the Docparser web application.

page_count.description: Number of pages in the document.

uploaded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

additionalProperties.description: Custom fields extracted by the parser rules (e.g., invoice_number, vendor_name, total_amount).
